name: Focaccia Bread-bill's
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the machine in the following order: water, salt, olive oil, egg, flour mixture (sugar and instant milk powder), sugar, instant milk powder, yeast.
2. Set to "dough" setting.
3. When dough is ready, divide into two portions.
4. Shape each portion into circles and place on baking sheets or pizza pans.
5. Brush lightly with olive oil.
6. Sprinkle evenly with garlic powder, onion powder, parsley flakes, basil, rosemary, feta or parmesan cheese (or both), and a little coarse salt.
7. Bake in an oven preheated to 450°F for 10 - 12 minutes.
